name: Panya 3 Light 25" Wall Sconce - SCN4062 - Nickel/White - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the elegant Panya 3 light wall sconce. Standing at 25 inches, this fixture combines style and functionality to enhance any room. Its chic nickel and white finish adds a touch of modern sophistication. Crafted from iron, this sconce offers a sleek design with a durable structure. Whether flanking a mirror or lining a hallway, its graceful presence creates a warm and inviting atmosphere. Perfect for elevating your decor, the Panya wall sconce seamlessly blends with various interiors, offering versatility and charm without compromise.
